acceptance.criterion: DEFAULT_GRAMMAR ships all six categories with bindings total over RENDERABLE_ROLES; strict parser rejects unbound/double-bound roles, unknown categories, non-critical danger; StylePack.validatePack rejects accent/motion/audio overlap and achromatic-optimization/danger-chromatic violations — REQ-070's mixing prohibition enforced structurally on both the grammar and pack sides (Grammar.test.ts, StylePack.test.ts)

Six structural categories each carry the palette/silhouette/motion/audio signature-role contract (StylePack interface); DEFAULT_GRAMMAR fixes the six ids + meanings; dm-0084 (achromatic optimization) and dm-0085 (goal->interactive) reconciliations closed in the binding data itself
